phrases.en: Dan (the host) greets Tom and Jenny (the guests) at the door.
phrases.zh: 主人丹在门口迎接客人汤姆和珍妮。

phrases.en: They give him a bottle of wine they brought.
phrases.zh: 他们把带来的一瓶葡萄酒送给他。

phrases.en: Inside, they say hello to some people they know.
phrases.zh: 进屋后，他们跟一些认识的人打招呼。

phrases.en: Dan introduces them to some people.
phrases.zh: 丹把他们介绍给一些人。

phrases.en: At the end of the evening, the guests say goodnight and thank Dan.
phrases.zh: 夜晚结束时，客人们道晚安并感谢丹。
